title: Set EXECUTIONS_TIMEOUT for long-running tasks
symptom: n8n fails to execute long-running tasks due to the default execution timeout settings.
applies_when: Need to run long tasks that exceed default execution time
not_this_if: Tasks complete within the default timeout
root_cause: The default execution timeout for workflows in self-hosted n8n instances may not accommodate long-running tasks. Setting the EXECUTIONS_TIMEOUT environment variable allows for longer execution durations.
fix_steps: Open your .env file or docker-compose file
Restart the n8n instance to apply changes
agent_instruction: Set the EXECUTIONS_TIMEOUT environment variable to allow longer task execution times.
